title: Amplex Red Hydrogen Peroxide Assay
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol can be used to measure the levels of hydrogen peroxide from THP-1 cells using Amplex Red reagent kit on the OT-2. 96-well plate format is used for this protocol. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples (5-12)`: Specify the number of samples for this run (from 5 to 12 samples). * `P300/P20 Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) for the P300 and P20 single channel pipettes. ---
steps_raw: This protocol can be used to measure the levels of hydrogen peroxide from THP-1 cells using Amplex Red reagent kit on the OT-2. 96-well plate format is used for this protocol. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Samples (5-12)`: Specify the number of samples for this run (from 5 to 12 samples). * `P300/P20 Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) for the P300 and P20 single channel pipettes. ---
The reagents that are kept in different deck slots are 5X Reaction buffer, distilled water,3%H2O2, HRP, Amplex Red and 1mM PMA.
Pick up 200μL tips from Slot 4. Dilution of reaction buffer from 5X to 1X concentration with distilled water

Dilution of the H2O2 stock from 3% (provided in the kit), to a required working concentration of 20mM, followed by dilution for the standard H2O2 concentrations ranging from 0-2μM in Eppendorf rack kept in Slot 7.
Dilution of PMA concentrations from 10mM to 10μM in Slot 5.
Dilution of PMA further, ranging from 0 to 150ng/mL in 1X Reaction buffer in Slot 7

Preparation of the working Amplex red-reaction buffer-HRP reagent in Slot 11. It is stored away in dark after preparation to avoid any loss of fluorescence. till the final step (put back in B1 slot of Opentrons 10-Tube Rack) when the reagent is added to the wells)
Concentrations of H2O2 for the standard curve (0 to 2μM) (Rows 0 and 2 of the 96 well plate that is kept on Temperature deck) were dispensed using 200μL tips.
Removal of complete medium from the wells of 96 well plate that contains cells (manual step) (E1 to E7, F1 to F7 and G1 to G7).
Putting the 96 well plate back to the temperature deck and maintained at 23°C for addition of different concentrations of PMA(0-150ng/mL)

Finally, the working reagent kept in the dark is taken out and placed in respective location in the Opentrons 10-Tube Rack (Location B1). 50μL of working reagent is dispensed in wells containing standards and THP-1 cells.
The temperature deck is set to 37°C. The fluorescence readings are taken at 15, 30, 45 and 60 min duration in the Biotek H1 instrument with excitation at 530 nm and emission at 590nm.
keywords: Measurement of peroxides/hydrogen peroxide from THP-1 cells
materials_raw: Greiner-Bio One 96-Well White TC plate with clear bottom
Opentrons 10 Tube Rack with Falcon 4X50 mL, 6X15mL Conical
(2) Opentrons 24 Tube Rack with Eppendorf 1.5 mL Safe-Lock Snapcap
Amplex Red Reagent Kit Cat No. A22188
THP-1 Macrophage-like cells (ATCC, Manassas, VA, USA) (No.TIB-202)
Phenol Red Free RPMI 1640 medium (Thermofisher Scientific 11835030)
Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) Not Heat Inactivated (ATCC, Cat No. 30-2020)
